patch.title: Hard Cutover: Behavior-First Rust Testing for Phase 0 Proof

patch.problem_statement: The Rust refactor test suite is not compliant with the new behavior-first testing framework standards. Current proof relies on mixed nextest/unit/integration and proof scripts without standards-required BDD-first scenario execution, mutation-strength gating, and behavior-proxy coverage interpretation. We need a hard cutover that resets Rust test assets and rebuilds them systematically against Phase 0 behaviors while preserving per-task demonstrability via just check and final closure via just ci.

motivations: Enforce standards compliance for Rust testing.
Improve behavior proof quality with positive and falsification witnesses.
Add mutation-strength enforcement to detect weak tests.
Treat coverage as behavior-gap signal rather than vanity metric.
Trial Tanren orchestration in self-host mode and assess readiness.

expectations: Every in-scope Phase 0 behavior maps to stable behavior IDs and executable scenarios.
Each implementation task ends with just check green and demonstrable stage output.
just ci remains the final full gate for spec completion.
Mutation and coverage gates are first-class and blocking at final enforcement.
Rust test cutover leaves no unmanaged legacy behavior-test path.
Meta-evaluation artifact captures orchestration friction and readiness findings.

planned_behaviors: PB-01 Standards baseline includes Rust testing standards and relevance context for this spec.
PB-02 Phase 0 behavior inventory maps Feature 1.1 through 8.1 to stable behavior IDs and scenarios.
PB-03 Scenario files (.feature) become the authoritative behavior proof path.
PB-04 Hard cutover deletes legacy Rust test suite and rebuilds incrementally by behavior waves.
PB-05 Nextest remains required for support/test-binary discipline alongside BDD scenarios.
PB-06 Mutation gate runs in CI/local; survivors require behavior-ID-linked triage.
PB-07 Coverage gate reports missing behavior vs dead/support code classification.
PB-08 Skip suppression is enforced for Rust behavior suites.
PB-09 justfile, pre-commit, CI workflows, and check-ci-parity remain synchronized.
PB-10 Phase 0 proof docs/scripts/evidence index reflect new testing flow.
PB-11 Orchestration trial outputs a meta-readiness report with actionable recommendations.

implementation_plan: Sync/inject Rust testing standards into active standards set.
Define behavior inventory and traceability schema for Phase 0 behaviors.
Introduce gate scaffolding early so each task can prove function and keep just check green.
Scaffold cucumber-rs harness and execute initial vertical slices.
Execute hard-cut milestone deleting legacy Rust behavior tests.
Rebuild behavior coverage in waves until all in-scope behaviors are proven.
Wire mutation and coverage gates with behavior-linked triage/classification artifacts.
Finalize strict enforcement in justfile/lefthook/CI/parity once suites are stable.
Refresh Phase 0 proof scripts/docs/evidence mapping for the new framework.
Produce meta-readiness report on Tanren command orchestration trial.

items: Scope is Rust test replacement only; Python legacy deletion is out of scope for this spec.
No long-lived dual old/new Rust behavior-test stacks.
Each task must end with just check green plus stage-specific demonstrable output.
just ci is the final spec gate before closure.
No skipped behavior scenarios or ignore-based suppression in the cutover suite.
Every behavior-changing claim must map to behavior IDs and scenarios.
Mutation regressions fail at final enforced gate.
Coverage interpretation remains behavior-first with explicit classification.
Gate parity across local hooks and CI must be preserved.
Meta-readiness output is mandatory for this trial run.

criterion.description: Active standards include Rust testing rules for BDD, mutation, coverage, no-skip, and traceability.
criterion.measurable: tanren/standards contains testing standards and relevance filters include this spec scope.

criterion.description: Behavior inventory maps all selected Phase 0 behaviors to stable IDs and scenario files.
criterion.measurable: Traceability artifact lists Feature 1.1-8.1 mappings with scenario references.

criterion.description: Scenario suite provides positive and falsification witnesses for each mapped behavior.
criterion.measurable: Each mapped behavior has at least one passing positive and one passing falsification scenario.

criterion.description: Hard cutover removes legacy Rust behavior-test paths and documents the post-cutover allowed test forms.
criterion.measurable: Legacy Rust tests are deleted from agreed paths and migration policy doc is updated.

criterion.description: justfile exposes staged behavior/mutation/coverage commands and final strict gates.
criterion.measurable: just recipes run successfully at intended stage and are referenced by CI parity checks.

criterion.description: Each task demonstrates functional progress and ends with just check green.
criterion.measurable: Task evidence includes stage command output plus successful just check run.

criterion.description: Mutation gate is blocking at final enforcement with survivor triage tied to behavior IDs.
criterion.measurable: CI/job failure occurs on regression and survivor records reference BEH-* IDs.

criterion.description: Coverage output includes classification of uncovered paths.
criterion.measurable: Coverage report includes missing-behavior vs dead/support code categories.

criterion.description: lefthook, GitHub workflows, and check-ci-parity validate the updated test model.
criterion.measurable: Local hooks and workflow commands pass parity guard with no drift.

criterion.description: Phase 0 proof scripts/docs are updated and reproducible with new test framework.
criterion.measurable: Runbook and evidence index commands regenerate expected proof artifacts.

criterion.description: Meta-evaluation records orchestration trial outcomes and recommendations.
criterion.measurable: A committed report captures strengths, friction points, and go/no-go guidance.

patch.description: Run behavior scenario gate and show behavior-ID-tagged scenario pass output.
patch.expected_observable: Scenario runner output shows passing BEH-* tagged scenarios.

patch.description: Run mutation gate and show pass/survivor triage evidence.
patch.expected_observable: Mutation output passes or records survivors with behavior-linked triage.

patch.description: Run coverage gate and show uncovered-path classification artifact.
patch.expected_observable: Coverage artifact classifies missing-behavior vs dead/support code.

patch.description: Run just check at task-stage and confirm green after staged changes.
patch.expected_observable: just check exits successfully with staged framework active.

patch.description: Run final just ci and verify full strict gate closure.
patch.expected_observable: just ci exits successfully including behavior, mutation, and coverage enforcement.

patch.description: Execute remote matrix verification step for workflow parity.
patch.expected_observable: GitHub Actions matrix run confirms workflow parity.

patch.reason: Requires remote GitHub Actions execution; not runnable in local shaping environment.

task.title: T01 Standards Sync For Rust Testing
task.description: Import/sync Rust testing standards (BDD, mutation, coverage interpretation, no-skip, traceability) into active standards and bind relevance context for this spec.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testing standards exist in active standards set.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Relevant standards are discoverable for this spec via standard.list/list_relevant_standards.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task closes with demonstrable function and just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Evidence includes standards diff plus successful just check.

task.title: T02 Phase 0 Behavior Inventory And Traceability
task.description: Define stable BEH-* IDs and map Phase 0 Feature 1.1-8.1 behaviors to executable scenario obligations (positive and falsification).

acceptance_criteria.description: Behavior map covers all in-scope Phase 0 behaviors.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Traceability artifact lists behavior ID -> scenario ownership.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task closes with just check green and artifact validation.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Artifact is linted/validated and just check succeeds.

task.title: T03 Early Gate Scaffolding (Non-Blocking)
task.description: Introduce staged justfile/CI scaffolding commands for BDD, mutation, and coverage without turning final enforcement on yet, so iterative tasks remain demonstrable.

acceptance_criteria.description: New staged commands run and are documented.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just targets for scenario/mutation/coverage scaffolding execute successfully.

acceptance_criteria.description: Existing just check contract remains green at task end.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes after scaffolding changes.

task.title: T04 BDD Harness Scaffold
task.description: Add cucumber-rs harness, feature directory conventions, tagging rules, and one smoke scenario path to prove harness viability.

acceptance_criteria.description: BDD harness executes at least one tagged scenario path.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Scenario command exits successfully and emits tag evidence.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes with harness scaffold in place.

task.title: T05 Wave A Scenario Migration (Features 1-3)
task.description: Implement behavior scenarios for Phase 0 Features 1-3 (typed lifecycle, replay durability, contract-derived interface/auth/replay protections).

acceptance_criteria.description: Mapped Wave A behaviors have positive and falsification scenarios.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Behavior map entries for Features 1-3 point to passing scenarios.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green and stage run evidence.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes and wave scenario run output is captured.

task.title: T06 Hard Cutover Delete Legacy Rust Tests
task.description: Delete legacy Rust behavior-test suite paths that are superseded by the new framework and document allowed post-cutover test forms.

acceptance_criteria.description: Legacy Rust test paths are removed per cutover policy.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Repository no longer contains deprecated Rust behavior-test files in scoped paths.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green after deletion.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes immediately after cutover deletion.

task.title: T07 Wave B Scenario Migration (Features 4-6)
task.description: Implement behavior scenarios for methodology boundary, task guard monotonicity, and typed tool-surface capability/transport parity behaviors.

acceptance_criteria.description: Mapped Wave B behaviors have passing positive/falsification scenarios.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Feature 4-6 mappings resolve to passing scenario evidence.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes with Wave B migration complete.

task.title: T08 Wave C Scenario Migration (Features 7-8)
task.description: Implement behavior scenarios for installer/self-host determinism and manual methodology walkthrough coherence.

acceptance_criteria.description: Mapped Wave C behaviors are scenario-backed.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Feature 7-8 mappings resolve to passing scenario evidence.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes with Wave C migration complete.

task.title: T09 Mutation Gate Integration
task.description: Integrate cargo-mutants mutation-strength gate, survivor triage policy, and behavior-ID linkage in artifacts/CI surfaces.

acceptance_criteria.description: Mutation gate runs in staged local and CI pathways.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Mutation command executes and output is machine-consumable for triage.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes after mutation integration.

task.title: T10 Coverage Classification Integration
task.description: Integrate behavior-first coverage workflow and classification outputs (missing-behavior vs dead/support code).

acceptance_criteria.description: Coverage run emits classification artifact tied to behavior inventory.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Report clearly separates missing scenarios from non-behavior code.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes after coverage integration.

task.title: T11 Final Gate Enforcement And Parity
task.description: Flip strict enforcement in justfile, lefthook, GitHub workflows, and check-ci-parity so behavior/mutation/coverage gates are mandatory in final flow.

acceptance_criteria.description: Strict enforcement is active and parity checks are updated.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Workflow and local command parity checks pass with enforced gates.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes under final enforcement configuration.

task.title: T12 Proof Docs And Scripts Refresh
task.description: Update Phase 0 proof runbook/scripts/evidence index to reflect the new Rust testing framework and reproducible execution path.

acceptance_criteria.description: Proof docs/scripts reference the new behavior-first test flow.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Runbook commands and evidence mapping are updated and coherent.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes after docs/script updates.

task.title: T13 Orchestration Trial Meta-Readiness Report
task.description: Produce a trial report evaluating shape-spec/task orchestration effectiveness, friction, and recommendations for using Tanren orchestration within Tanren itself.

acceptance_criteria.description: Meta report captures strengths, frictions, and proposed mitigations.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Report includes explicit go/no-go readiness recommendation.

acceptance_criteria.description: Spec closure criteria include final just ci success.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Report references final just ci result as the terminal gate outcome.

outcome.summary: Shaped hard-cut Rust testing replacement spec with staged just check demonstrability, final just ci closure, and full task/demo/acceptance coverage.

T01 standards sync complete: 5 rust-testing standards (bdd-scenarios, mutation-strength, coverage-behavior-first, no-skip-enforcement, behavior-traceability) added under tanren/standards/rust-testing/ and discoverable via standard.list. just check green.

score.rationale: T01 acceptance criteria satisfied: five rust-testing standards were added and do-task evidence includes a successful just check run.
Task adds small markdown standards only; no runtime path or performance-sensitive code changed.
Standards are declarative and apply through pattern matching; no scale-limiting implementation introduced.
Standards capture explicit invariants (BEH tagging, no-skip, mutation triage, coverage classification) without ambiguous task behavior.
No secrets handling or boundary code changed; standards reinforce safer behavior-proof discipline without expanding attack surface.
No executable runtime logic changed in T01; just check passed for the repository state after task implementation evidence.
Standards are split into focused documents with clear category and metadata, improving ongoing maintenance clarity.
New standards are modular by topic and can be extended independently as later tasks operationalize the testing framework.
Implementation uses minimal, direct additions aligned with task scope: standards content only, no unnecessary scaffolding.
Markdown standard files follow established frontmatter and prose conventions used by existing tanren standards.
Changes are scoped to T01 intent: syncing rust-testing standards and recording just check evidence.
Each concern (BDD, mutation, coverage, no-skip, traceability) is isolated in its own standard file with clear boundaries.
Task output is documentation-first and complete for its stated scope; each required standard topic is present.

outcome.summary: T01 audit complete: no fix_now findings; all 13 task-scope pillars scored 10/10 with standards sync evidence and just check passing.
